aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to significant gaps in structured data and conversational content. While they have strong reviews, their lack of schema and FAQ content limits AI visibility.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema to provide AI with structured business information.
Create an FAQ page addressing common HVAC queries to capture AI-driven search queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a 5-star rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve local search presence.
Missing Q&A section engagement, which could address customer concerns proactively.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected, ensuring reliable business information across platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
Absence of Review schema to highlight customer testimonials

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from identifying them as a reliable local HVAC provider.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in New Braunfels' or '24/7 AC service near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness schema to provide AI with essential business details.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating comprehensive FAQ content and HowTo guides to establish topical authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing your digital presence for answer engines.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and FAQ content, making it less visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, creates conversational content, and enhances GBP engagement to make your business the top choice for AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, so acting now is crucial to stay ahead in the local market.

email_subject_line: Boost Your HVAC Business with AI-Ready Strategies!
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to enhance your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your digital presence for AI-driven searches.
